title: Misbehavior in the FTS5 xBestIndex method
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ft USING fts5(x);
SELECT * FROM ft WHERE ft.rowid IS NULL;
description:
drh added on 2018-04-09 14:20:30:
The xBestIndex method of the FTS5 virtual table misbehaves in the following
input:
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ft USING fts5(x);
SELECT * FROM ft WHERE ft.rowid IS NULL;
The above results in an error:  "ft.xBestIndex malfunction".  In other
queries, this malfunction might result in memory leaks or even
NULL pointer dereferences.
key_bug_features: xBestIndex method misbehavior with NULL rowid
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ft1 USING fts5(x TEXT, y INTEGER);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE ft2 USING fts5(a TEXT, b REAL);
SELECT * FROM ft1 WHERE ft1.rowid IS NULL;
